title: dortmanna trigonocaulis
intro: Dortmanna trigonocaulis, also known as the Dortmann's trigonocaulis or Japanese liverwort, is a species of liverwort in the family Peltigerales. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion and promote the production of bile. The health benefits of Dortmanna trigonocaulis include its potential to treat liver and gallbladder disorders, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and a laxative. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
